issue.author: nikic
issue.body:
Missing this fold: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/5Hlb2C

```llvm
define i1 @src(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %add = add i8 %x, 1
  %c1 = icmp ne i8 %x, -1
  %c2 = icmp ule i8 %add, %y
  %and = and i1 %c1, %c2
  ret i1 %and
}

define i1 @tgt(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %c = icmp ult i8 %x, %y
  ret i1 %c
}
```

This can also be seen as a two-step fold with the intermediate step:
```llvm
define i1 @tgt(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %add = add i8 %x, 1
  %c1 = icmp ne i8 %x, -1
  %c2 = icmp ult i8 %x, %y
  %and = and i1 %c1, %c2
  ret i1 %and
}
```
Where we can replace `x + 1 <= y` with `x < y` because we know `x != -1` from the first and condition.
issue.title: [InstCombine] Missing and of icmp fold

tests.current_optimized_program:

  %add = add i8 %x, 1
  %c1 = icmp ne i8 %x, -1
  %c2 = icmp ule i8 %add, %y
  %and = and i1 %c1, %c2
  ret i1 %and
}
tests.source_program:

  %add = add i8 %x, 1
  %c1 = icmp ne i8 %x, -1
  %c2 = icmp ule i8 %add, %y
  %and = and i1 %c1, %c2
  ret i1 %and
}
